Class CurrentLineHighlighter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.utilities.CurrentLineHighlighter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Highlighter
public class CurrentLineHighlighter extends Object implements Highlighter
Swing highlighter that highlights the current line in a JTextComponent. It delegates all other methods to the standard Highlighter such that it can be used as a drop-in replacement.

  • Nested Class Summary
